about_hero_subtitle: Learn about GL-Orbit's approach to schedules, Girls' Love series info, streaming platforms, and questions new fans often ask.
about_ai_section_desc: Self-contained Q&A summaries about GL-Orbit, easy for users and search engines.
about_lead: For new viewers and fans who want to understand the Girls' Love universe more deeply, GL-Orbit summarizes the key points to start following GL series easily.

about_hero_lede_1: GL-Orbit is a central hub for fans of Girls' Love (GL) series who want to track news in one place — from upcoming episode schedules and series details to cast, studios, and streaming platforms. The site was built to make following GL series easier for Thai viewers and international fans who want to know what is airing, what is coming soon, and when the next episode drops.
about_pullquote: From the schedule board to the next must-watch series — everything in the GL universe lives in one place.
about_hero_lede_2: The GL-Orbit home page is designed as a control panel for the GL universe. Users can start with the daily schedule, check countdowns for episodes airing soon, explore featured recommendations, and click into details to see status, episode count, streaming platforms, and the Uncut badge that tells whether a release is the uncensored version.
about_hero_lede_3: We focus on information that is easy to read and genuinely useful, not just a short list of titles. Fans usually need more context: Thai and English titles, related artists, and air times matched to their own timezone. Checking GL-Orbit regularly helps avoid missing important episodes and makes it easier to discover new GL series.
about_hero_lede_4: For viewers following multiple shows at once, GL-Orbit reduces the confusion of announcements spread across many platforms. Whether on YouTube, iQIYI, GagaOOLala, WeTV, or official studio channels, the home page gives a clear overview before diving into each series' air dates, episode list, cast, and status.
about_seo_description: Learn about GL-Orbit — a hub for Girls' Love series schedules, cast info, streaming platforms, Uncut versions, and fan guidance.
about_guide_card_1_title: Track GL schedules without missing new episodes
about_guide_card_1_desc: GL-Orbit gathers Girls' Love series schedules in one place, with dates, times, platforms, and Uncut status so fans can plan their viewing easily.
about_guide_card_2_title: Find series, cast, and related studios
about_guide_card_2_desc: The home page connects to a database of series, artist listings, and studio details so users can explore the GL universe continuously from currently airing shows to upcoming titles.
about_guide_card_3_title: Check watch links, platforms, and Uncut versions
about_guide_card_3_desc: Each episode is designed to answer the questions viewers care about: where it airs, what time, whether an Uncut version exists, and when to check the schedule again.
about_howto_step_1_text: Start with the Live Countdown to see which GL episodes are about to air within the next 24 hours.
about_howto_step_2_text: Go to the calendar page for a daily and weekly overview, including Uncut releases, before choosing where to watch.
about_howto_step_3_text: Use the series page to find currently airing, upcoming, and completed series along with cast and studio details.
about_howto_step_4_text: Streaming platform schedules and release times may change with new announcements. Bookmarking the home page helps you verify the latest info faster.
about_gl101_card_1_desc: GL, or Girls' Love, refers to series that portray relationships between women. It originated from Japanese manga and anime Yuri culture before expanding to live-action dramas and series across Thailand, Korea, China, Japan, and Taiwan, giving fans GL series to follow all year round.
about_gl101_card_2_desc: GL series have grown popular through diverse storytelling, on-screen chemistry, and strong fan communities on social media. Many shows become cultural phenomena that people discuss and share widely, prompting studios and streaming platforms to invest more in this content.
about_gl101_card_3_desc: Thailand is one of the leading markets producing globally popular GL series, with many Thai studios and production companies creating high-quality works that attract viewers at home and abroad. GL-Orbit collects both Thai and international GL series in one place so viewers can follow their favorites conveniently.
about_gl101_card_4_title: How is GL different from Yuri?
about_gl101_card_4_desc: Yuri is a term commonly used in manga and anime for stories about similar relationships, while GL (Girls' Love) is the broader term used in live-action series. Although their meanings overlap, GL-Orbit focuses mainly on live-action dramas and series.
about_platform_1_desc: The most accessible place to watch GL series. Many studios release episodes officially on their own YouTube channels with multilingual subtitles. GL-Orbit tracks upload times so fans never miss a new release.
about_platform_2_desc: A global streaming service with a large library of GL and Asian series, often offering special editions and high-quality viewing. GL-Orbit helps viewers check the status and schedule of series on iQIYI.
about_platform_3_desc: A platform focused on LGBTQ+ content, including Boys' Love and Girls' Love. It is one of the key destinations for GL fans looking for diverse titles from many countries.
about_platform_4_desc: A streaming platform with a large collection of Asian and Thai series, including GL titles produced in partnership with Thai studios. Viewers can check new episodes and air times through the GL-Orbit schedule board.
about_platform_5_desc: Beyond major platforms, some GL series are released through the studio's own websites or apps. GL-Orbit collects these platform details so viewers can reach the correct and up-to-date watch links.
about_ai_a_1: GL-Orbit is a central hub for Girls' Love series fans that combines schedules, series info, cast, studios, streaming platforms, and Uncut status in one place to help viewers follow new episodes and discover the next GL series to watch.
about_ai_q_2: How does GL-Orbit help track GL series schedules?
about_ai_a_2: GL-Orbit presents new GL episodes in an easy-to-read format with air dates, times, streaming platforms, and Uncut badges. Users can check upcoming titles, plan their viewing, and verify the schedule from one place.
about_ai_q_3: Where can I watch GL series?
about_ai_a_3: GL series are usually released on official platforms such as YouTube, iQIYI, GagaOOLala, WeTV, and direct studio channels. GL-Orbit gathers these platform details so fans can choose the right and current way to watch.
about_ai_q_4: What does Uncut mean in GL series?
about_ai_a_4: Uncut means the episode or airing is the version without content cuts. This badge helps GL fans check whether a platform offers the full version before watching, especially since different channels may release different versions.
about_faq_a_1: It is for fans of Girls' Love series, both long-time followers and new viewers who want to explore GL series through schedules, series listings, cast, studios, and related streaming platforms.
about_faq_q_2: How does the GL-Orbit schedule help?
about_faq_a_2: The schedule gathers new episode information in an easy-to-read format. Users can see upcoming airings, near-release titles, and air-time details without searching across multiple sources.
about_faq_q_3: What does Uncut mean on the website?
about_faq_a_3: The Uncut badge indicates that an episode or release has a version without cuts. This is information GL fans often want to verify before choosing a streaming platform.
about_faq_q_4: Why should I check GL-Orbit regularly?
about_faq_a_4: Schedules and platform information may change based on producer or streaming service announcements. Checking GL-Orbit regularly helps viewers see the latest updates and avoid missing important episodes.
about_faq_q_5: How is this site different from a typical series recommendation list?
about_faq_a_5: GL-Orbit is not just a recommendation list. It serves as a data hub for tracking GL series, including schedules, countdowns, cast lists, watch links, and the context of each title within the fan community.
about_faq_q_6: How do Thai GL series differ from international ones?
about_faq_a_6: Thai GL series often have their own storytelling rhythm and presentation style, while series from Korea, China, or Japan differ in format and episode length. GL-Orbit collects GL series from multiple countries so viewers can follow according to their preferences.
about_faq_a_7: Viewing schedules, series listings, and cast information on GL-Orbit is free. Watching actual episodes depends on the policy of each streaming platform, which may offer free access or require a subscription.
about_howto_name: How to use GL-Orbit to track GL series
about_howto_description: Steps to use GL-Orbit for checking schedules, finding series, and verifying the latest updates
